response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack and systems developer, but the profile fundamentally mismatches this role. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese (a hard requirement), no Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, no L2/L3 networking or switch background, and no security-technology exposure (MACsec, 802.1X, captive portal). C experience is limited to a brief seven-month stint in 2014-2015; recent work is TypeScript/Node.js web and cloud development. Embedded exposure is peripheral (robotic arms, audio server) rather than firmware for networking products.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software development experience, well above the 3-year minimum
Strong Linux, low-latency systems, and testing/TDD craftsmanship background
Fluent English with proven technical communication and teaching ability
concerns: No indication of Japanese language proficiency, which is a mandatory requirement
No Linux kernel, L2/L3 networking, switch, or security-protocol (MACsec/802.1X) experience
C for UNIX proficiency is dated and shallow; current focus is web/full-stack TypeScript

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking/security or kernel experience
Strong general engineering and Linux background
